name: grill-each-other
description: Producer-side claim discipline for AI agents: scholastic + Greek dialectic vocabulary, peer-grill file-based reconciliation, runnable verifiers/falsifiers. Synthesis: an unexamined claim does not exist.

skills.name: peer-grill
skills.description: File-based multi-agent reconciliation protocol. Two+ agents independently dump claims, grill each other in append-only logs, ratify with sha256 attestation.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: Single-track relentless interview to stress-test a plan or design until shared understanding is reached.

skills.name: grill-me-agents
skills.description: 13-branch interview for multi-agent collaboration designs. Use when subject is multi-agent topology or fleet design.

skills.name: dialectic-vocabulary
skills.description: Scholastic + Greek vocabulary for grilling: ἔλεγχος, ἀλήθεια, quaestio, sed contra, respondeo. Greek for the soul of inquiry, Latin for the form on the page.
